Paragraph.Sentence: The first four terms of an arithmetic sequence are given below. Choose the algebraic expression that represents the nth term in this sequence.

response.feedback: Right! The expression you selected, 4n - 1, is correct.
The student got this item correct.
Sorry, the expression you selected, 3n - 4, is incorrect. The sequence in the question is: 3, 7, 11, 15,... But the expression you selected describes the sequence: -1, 2, 5, 8, ...
The student did not get this item right.
Sorry, the expression you selected, 4n + 1, is incorrect. The sequence in the question is: 3, 7, 11, 15,... But the expression you selected describes the sequence: 5, 9, 13, 17, ...
The student did not get this item right.
Sorry, the expression you selected, 4n, is incorrect. The sequence in the question is: 3, 7, 11, 15,... But the expression you selected describes the sequence: 4, 8, 12, 16, ...
The student did not get this item right.
Sorry, the expression you selected, 4n + 3, is incorrect. The sequence in the question is: 3, 7, 11, 15,... But the expression you selected describes the sequence: 7, 11, 15, 19, ...
The student did not get this item right.
